lines.speaker: Draul Leptoc
lines.text: What are you doing in my house...why the impertinence...the sheer cheek...how dare you violate my personal lodgings....

lines.speaker: Draul Leptoc
lines.text: Well get out! Get out....this is my house....and don't go near my daughter Juliet...she's grounded in her room to keep her away from that good for nothing Romeo.

lines.speaker: Draul Leptoc
lines.text: I suppose you're quite pleased with yourself now...
